headline.purpose: Page and mobile screen headings with softened weight.

body.purpose: Descriptions, table cells, and recommendation explanations.

label.purpose: Form labels, table headers, and compact metadata.

shadows.name: floating-action
shadows.purpose: Floating controls that sit above content.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Hover, focus, and active state transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary task action for save, create, and submit.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #1f6f5b; color: #fff; border: 1px solid #1f6f5b; border-radius: 6px; min-height: 42px; padding: 9px 14px; font: 700 14px/1.5 ui-rounded, 'SF Pro Rounded', 'Nunito Sans', 'Microsoft YaHei UI', system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background-color 160ms ease-out, border-color 160ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #185746; border-color: #185746; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgba(31, 111, 91, 0.24); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: Labeled field for catalog search and product editing.
components.css: .ds-field { display: grid; gap: 6px; color: #42484b; font: 700 13px/1.4 ui-rounded, 'SF Pro Rounded', 'Nunito Sans', 'Microsoft YaHei UI', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-field input { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #cbd1d3; border-radius: 6px; color: #222222; min-height: 42px; padding: 9px 11px; font: 400 14px/1.5 ui-rounded, 'SF Pro Rounded', 'Nunito Sans', 'Microsoft YaHei UI', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-field input:focus { border-color: #1f6f5b; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(31, 111, 91, 0.16); outline: none; }

components.name: Status Chip
components.description: Compact status indicator for stock and readiness state.
components.css: .ds-chip-ok { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 999px; background: #e3f2ea; color: #1f6f5b; padding: 5px 9px; font: 800 12px/1.35 ui-rounded, 'SF Pro Rounded', 'Nunito Sans', 'Microsoft YaHei UI', system-ui, sans-serif; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Panel Card
components.description: Flat bordered surface for admin panels and mobile cards.
components.html:
Panel title

Important state and product evidence live here.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #d9dddf; border-radius: 8px; color: #222222; padding: 16px; font-family: ui-rounded, 'SF Pro Rounded', 'Nunito Sans', 'Microsoft YaHei UI', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card h2 { margin: 0 0 8px; font-size: 18px; line-height: 1.35; font-weight: 700; } .ds-card p { margin: 0; color: #687174; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.55; }

narrative.overview: BuyWise is a product UI system for repeated shopping and operations tasks. It should feel calm, legible, and specific: a place where products, recommendation reasons, and readiness states are easier to compare than they were before.
keyCharacteristics: Shared state vocabulary across Android and web admin.
Crisp borders and tonal surfaces instead of decorative shadows.

rules.name: The Evidence Color Rule
rules.body: Accent color must point to a real state, action, or shopping signal. It is not decoration.

rules.name: The Product Type Rule
rules.body: Do not use display typography in labels, buttons, data, or navigation.

rules.name: The Border Or Shadow Rule
rules.body: A component can use a border or a meaningful shadow, never a decorative pairing of both.

dos: Do keep admin tables dense and scannable.
Do show product evidence before recommendation language.
Do keep touch targets at least 44px on Android and mobile web.
Do use borders and tonal surfaces as the default container language.
donts: Don't make the admin console look like a consumer storefront.
